codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the prior Mission permission-label regression by preserving Mission-specific framing while restoring distinct backend approval semantics for multi-option prompts.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission permission UIs should preserve backend-provided option semantics and labels from optionsMeta even when Mission-specific framing is added, but that convention is still not documented in AGENTS.md or the mission library notes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/renderer/src/state/appReducer.ts:913-933 stores request.optionsMeta from backend permission options; src/renderer/src/components/SpecReviewCard.tsx:92-99 renders per-option labels; src/renderer/src/lib/missionUiSemantics.ts:151-164 now preserves labels for multi-option Mission permissions. Mission AGENTS.md and .factory/library/{architecture,mission-runtime,environment}.md do not document this convention.

summary: Reviewed the fix feature handoff, transcript skeleton, prior failed scrutiny report, worker skill, and commit 83db032. The original blocking issue is resolved: Mission permission prompts keep specialized framing while distinct approval choices remain visibly distinguishable, so this re-review passes.
